use_cases: Interactive 3D portfolio showcase with orbiting image galleries
Immersive landing page hero with particle sphere visualization
Product showcase experience with cosmic-themed rotating images
Creative portfolio display with dynamic particle effects
SaaS landing page hero section with engaging 3D visuals
ai_summary: A Three.js-powered 3D particle sphere visualization component that displays images orbiting around a dynamic cosmic particle cloud. Features 1500 animated particles with randomized positioning on a sphere surface, continuous Y-axis rotation, and orbiting image planes. The component uses @react-three/fiber and @react-three/drei for 3D rendering, supports customizable image arrays, and creates an immersive space-themed gallery experience perfect for landing pages and creative portfolios.
